task: low-OOD closed-loop LANE-KEEPING instrument + REF-C 2nd arm + first absolute (low-OOD) closed-loop comparison of the two main arms

flagship.identity: deployed flagship v1 (speedjerk-30k); decode = strategic_policy(nav=follow) -> tactical_policy -> waypoints[5] (0.5s lookahead)

refc.identity: REF-C base 104.2M (anchored-diffusion); decode = model(fw, nav_cmd=None(->follow), v0=ev, steps=2)['traj'][:,0] (0.5s lookahead)

input_contract.frames: canonical phase-0 val cache physicalai-val-0c5f7dac3b11 [W=8, 9ch, 256x256] in [0,1] — the SAME f-theta 3-frame stack BOTH arms trained on (f_eff=266). No re-canonicalization needed: refc_driver.py re-canonicalizes ONLY because NuRec hands it raw native f-theta; here the source is already the canonical cache => the f-theta canonical input contract is met by construction.
input_contract.both_arms_see: IDENTICAL warped real-footage window fw each tick (parity)
input_contract.nav: both arms drive nav=follow (flagship idx 0; REF-C nav_cmd=None which maps to follow idx 0 internally)
input_contract.controller: shared verbatim: 0.5s pure-pursuit (wp_to_control) -> kinematic bicycle (WHEELBASE 2.7, dt 0.1)

val.parity_note: 40-ep clean val (registry §0.3: 40 ep -> 881 windows on tanitad-eval)

metric.corridor_departure_rate: fraction of on-policy steps whose |XTE| (== |signed lateral offset dlat|) exceeds a lane HALF-width threshold
metric.threshold_citation: 1.75 m = half of a 3.5 m lane (US arterial / German Autobahn class: US Interstate 3.6 m, RAA Autobahn 3.5-3.75 m, urban 3.0-3.5 m). Companion grid 1.0 m (wheel-over-line for a ~1.8 m vehicle) and 2.5 m (into the adjacent lane).
companion_metrics: window_departure_rate (fraction of windows that ever leave the corridor)
metric.tick0_selfcheck: on-path at k=0 -> |XTE|=0 -> zero departures for every arm (asserted in-harness)

estimator: episode-cluster bootstrap over val episodes (taniteval/ci.py, n_boot=2000) per arm; PAIRED episode-cluster bootstrap (same windows each draw) for flagship-vs-REF-C
honest_bounds: Measures LANE-KEEPING / on-policy drift at LOW OOD. STRUCTURALLY NOT off-road/collision: the real-footage source is map-free and agent-free, so it can only emit deviation from the recorded corridor. A real off-road/collision rate needs AlpaSim (map+agents+low-OOD renderer) = the ~3.2x-OOD instrument this source exists to escape (RETRACTION_LOG 07-22/07-23).

OOD ratio uses the flagship-measured 12-ep source envelope (lowood_flagship_ci.json), applied to each arm's own on-policy deviations; INHERITED-from-12ep for the OOD mapping only. The corridor/XTE/ADE metrics need NO envelope.
Controller = shared pure-pursuit + bicycle (not each model's own controller); the deviation is each planner's tracking behaviour through the identical controller.
Resolution 256x256 / f_eff=266 phase-0 cache (native is 1080x1920); the real-footage source sidesteps reconstruction entirely (RETRACTION_LOG 07-23 native-res residual).
